query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
    id              INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    filename        VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    checksum        CHAR(64)     NOT NULL,
    applied_at      DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    applied_by      VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL,
    UNIQUE KEY uk_sv_filename (filename)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_drift_log (
    id              BIGINT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
    run_at          DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    mode            VARCHAR(20)  NOT NULL DEFAULT 'live',
    endpoints_tested INT         NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    objects_validated INT        NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    total_issues    INT          NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    exit_code       TINYINT      NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    report_json     JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    INDEX idx_sdl_run (run_at),
    INDEX idx_sdl_exit (exit_code)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_detection_format (
    type            VARCHAR(255)  NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    display_name    VARCHAR(500)  DEFAULT NULL,
    author          VARCHAR(255)  DEFAULT NULL,
    categories      JSON          DEFAULT NULL,
    is_user_created BOOLEAN       DEFAULT NULL,
    mitre_categories JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    properties      JSON          DEFAULT NULL,
    status          VARCHAR(50)   DEFAULT NULL,
    released        BIGINT        DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)   NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (type),
    KEY fk_dtf_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_dtf_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS dim_detection (
    id              INT          NOT NULL,
    raw_id          BIGINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL,
    appliance_id    INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    assignee        VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    categories      JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    create_time     BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    description     TEXT         DEFAULT NULL,
    end_time        BIGINT       DEFAULT NULL,
    is_user_created BOOLEAN      NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
    mitre_tactics   JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    mitre_techniques JSON        DEFAULT NULL,
    mod_time        BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    participants    JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    properties      JSON         DEFAULT NULL,
    recommended     BOOLEAN      DEFAULT NULL,
    recommended_factors JSON     DEFAULT NULL,
    resolution      VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    risk_score      INT          DEFAULT NULL,
    start_time      BIGINT       NOT NULL,
    status          VARCHAR(50)  DEFAULT NULL,
    ticket_id       VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL,
    ticket_url      VARCHAR(2048) DEFAULT NULL,
    title           VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
    type            VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
    url             VARCHAR(2048) DEFAULT NULL,
    update_time     BIGINT       DEFAULT NULL,
    polled_at       DATETIME(3)  NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3),
    PRIMARY KEY (id),
    KEY idx_det_type (type),
    KEY idx_det_status (status),
    KEY idx_det_risk (risk_score),
    KEY idx_det_start_time (start_time),
    KEY idx_det_create_time (create_time),
    KEY fk_det_raw (raw_id),
    CONSTRAINT fk_det_raw FOREIGN KEY (raw_id) REFERENCES raw_api_response(id)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3xenzgJ3NGNThF2.e615124e9d05 --database FAgcVHDa53BkVwvRfvbPzh --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_version (
